results.title: NC Rejects PDP’s Backdoor Appointment Charge
results.description: Kashmir, Observer, Jammu, Srinagar, Latest Kashmir News, Kashmir News, Kashmir Latest News The Jammu and Kashmir government on Sunday strongly rejected the People's Democratic Party's allegations of backdoor appointments through outsourcing, asserting that all engagements have been made transparently and in accordance with an outsourcing policy framed during the PDP-BJP government. The post NC Rejects PDP’s Backdoor Appointment Charge appeared first on Kashmir Observer .
